title: The Asiatic Society Act, 1984
full_text: The Asiatic Society Act, 1984 एशियाटिक सोसाइटी अधिनियम, 1984 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198405 Act Number: 05 Enactment Date: 1984-03-23 Act Year: 1984 Short Title: The Asiatic Society Act, 1984 Hindi Title: एशियाटिक सोसाइटी अधिनियम, 1984 Long Title: An Act to declare the institution known as the Asiatic Society having at present its registered office in Calcutta to be an institution of national importance and to provide for certain matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Culture Enforcement Date: 25-06-1984 Notification: 25th June, 1984, vide notification No. G.S.R. 470(E), dated 25th June, 1984, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. (i). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Asiatic Society Act, 1984 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2.
